title: Database corruption following INSERT with a TRIGGER that does an affinity change
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE fuzz_postgresql_t2(tt TEXT PRIMARY KEY, ss INTEGER);
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION fuzz_postgresql_t1_ai() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN INSERT INTO fuzz_postgresql_t2(tt) VALUES(NEW.ii::TEXT);
key_bug_features: INSERT with nested triggers converting TEXT to INTEGER
